top_signals.title: Nvidia's Huang calls black market data centers made of smuggled parts a 'dead end'
top_signals.summary: Washington regulators and the Trump administration are increasingly wary of China getting ahold of advanced AI software and hardware.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ex-Tricolor COO to Plead Guilty to Fraud in Firm’s Collapse
top_signals.summary: Former Tricolor Holdings Chief Operating Officer David Goodgame told a judge that he will plead guilty to fraud charges stemming from the used-car dealer and lender’s collapse last year.

top_signals.title: Feds seize alleged cyber-scam infrastructure connected to Southeast Asian company
top_signals.summary: The Department of Justice announced the “seizure of a cloud computing account” used by subsidiaries of the Huione Group, a conglomerate severed from the U.S. financial system last year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
